sidebar_secure_desc: Your data is encrypted and never shared with third parties. Reports are delivered directly to your inbox.
sidebar_fast_desc: Most reports are generated within minutes and sent straight to your email.
landing_hero_desc: Paste a listing URL. Get a full property analysis — pricing, risks, livability, investment potential — as a PDF in your inbox within minutes.
landing_types_desc: Renting or buying, residential or commercial.
landing_how_desc: Three steps to a full report.
landing_step1_desc: Copy the property listing link from any major platform and paste it into the form.
landing_step2_desc: We send the finished report directly to your inbox. No spam, no sharing.
landing_step3_desc: The listing is analyzed across 12 dimensions and delivered as a detailed, scored PDF.
landing_features_desc: Each report covers pricing, risk, location quality, and investment potential in concrete detail.
landing_feat1_desc: The asking price compared against local market data with a fair-value estimate.
landing_feat2_desc: Safety, noise, amenities, foot traffic, and neighborhood trends mapped out.
landing_feat3_desc: Landlord, legal, zoning, and construction risks flagged before you commit.
landing_feat4_desc: Most reports are generated and sent within minutes of submission.
landing_feat5_desc: A single composite score so you can compare multiple properties directly.
landing_feat6_desc: Clean, structured report you can save locally, print, or forward.
landing_cta_title: Try it on your next listing.
landing_cta_desc: Paste a URL, add your email, and get the full report. No sign-up needed.
